calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Ex Parte Petition For Withdrawal Of Funds From Minor'S Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kizzy Howard (Mother).

The Court stated that it had signed an order releasing a small amount of money and that Ms. Howard was here to oppose. Ms. Howard presented argument to support her position stating that she only requested what the Minor had asked for since he can't run around like all the other children and he is in the house all the time. The Court ordered $400 to be withdrawn from the blocked account for purchases at Toys R Us. In addition, the Court stated that the money belonged to Ms. Howard's son and informed her that it is the Court's responsibility to guard his money until he turns eighteen.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-23-2006 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2005 Off Calendar: Trial De Novo Filed

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action (Minor)
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: June Leathley.
Bryan J. McCormack, Esq., for Petitioner: Kizzy Howard, present, as Guardian at litem for: Kenneth Amons, a Minor also present. No appearance by father Kenneth Amons.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows: Settlement: $115,000.00; Total Medical: $48,572.57; Medical Reduction: $2,821.04, Medical paid: $11,284.14; Medical owed $8,463.10; Attorney's Fees $28,023.93;
Costs $2,904.29.
A net balance of $75,608.68 to be deposited into a blocked account with U.S Bank at 3rd and Crusader St., San Francisco, Ca. No withdrawals shall be made without a court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Plaintiff's counsel to submit proposed order for Court's signature.

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: June Leathley.
Bryan J. McCormack, Esq., for Petitioner: Kizzy Howard, present, as Guardian at litem for: Kenneth Amons, a Minor also present. No appearance by father Kenneth Amons.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows: Settlement: $115,000.00; Total Medical: $48,572.57; Medical Reduction: $2,821.04, Medical paid: $11,284.14; Medical owed $8,463.10; Attorney's Fees $28,023.93;
Costs $2,904.29.
A net balance of $75,608.68 to be deposited into a blocked account with U.S Bank, Bayview Branch, San Francisco, Ca. No withdrawals shall be made without a court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Plaintiff's counsel to submit proposed order for Court's signature.

Feb. 9, 2006
Orders signed by Comm. Kaplan.
